=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (6:10-6:29) TS377079: This Effect code uses `crypto.randomUUID()`, prefer the Effect `Random` module instead because it uses Effect-injected randomness rather than the `crypto` module behind the scenes. effect(cryptoRandomUUIDInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable cryptoRandomUUIDInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable cryptoRandomUUIDInEffect for entire file"

[D2] (12:10-12:35) TS377079: This Effect code uses `crypto.randomUUID()`, prefer the Effect `Random` module instead because it uses Effect-injected randomness rather than the `crypto` module behind the scenes. effect(cryptoRandomUUIDInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable cryptoRandomUUIDInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable cryptoRandomUUIDInEffect for entire file"
